idea-plugin.name: Format Transformer
idea-plugin.description:
Convert JSON into developer-friendly formats.

Format Transformer is a lightweight IntelliJ IDEA plugin that converts JSON into multiple output formats using an extensible conversion engine. Fully offline — no AI, no cloud, no API calls.

Supported output formats

  • application.properties
  • YAML
  • XML
  • Plain Text
  • CSV
  • Markdown Table
  • Java Map
  • Java Properties Object

Features

  • Nested objects, arrays, booleans, numbers, strings, and null values
  • Unlimited nesting depth with recursive conversion
  • Strict JSON validation with clear error dialog before conversion
  • Saves converted output next to the source JSON file
  • Opens result in a new editor tab without modifying the original file
  • Right-click menu and toolbar popup for quick format selection
  • Extensible converter engine — new formats can be added without changing existing code

How to use

  1. Open a JSON file in the editor
  2. Right-click → Convert JSON → select a format
  3. View the converted file in a new editor tab

Documentation  |  Issue tracker
idea-plugin.change-notes:
2.0.0

  • Extensible conversion engine with Strategy + Factory architecture
  • Eight output formats: properties, YAML, XML, Text, CSV, Markdown, Java Map, Java Properties
  • Dynamic Convert JSON submenu and toolbar popup
  • Save converted output next to the source JSON file
  • Strict JSON validation with error dialog
